name: Oath of Glory Spells
desc: The magic of your oath ensures you always have certain spells ready; when you reach a Paladin level specified in the Oath of Glory Spells table, you thereafter always have the listed spells prepared.

| Paladin Level | Spells |
| --- | --- |
| 3 | Guiding Bolt, Heroism |
| 5 | Enhance Ability, Magic Weapon |
| 9 | Haste, Protection from Energy |
| 13 | Compulsion, Freedom of Movement |
| 17 | Legend Lore, Yolande's Regal Presence |
